description: CrackMapExec (a.k.a. CME) is a post-exploitation tool that helps automate assessing the security of large Active Directory networks.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/crackmapexec && python3 crackmapexec.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/crackmapexec && python3 crackmapexec.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/crackmapexec && python3 crackmapexec.py --help`. Post-exploitation tool for AD (the Python package).
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the post_exploitation category. Fits when the engagement needs: Post-exploitation tool for AD (the Python package).
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Post-exploitation tool for AD (the Python package).
